body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This attempts two changes aimed at decreasing ci time.



## Content

Speed up diagnostics setup by:
- In the diagnostics test for the land model, make the tendency functions do nothing, and make a dummy solver.
- Don't always define all diagnostics if they are not used

## Results

### Locally with normal optimization level: 
before: diagnostics ~ 867s
after: diagnostics - 190s


### GHA CI Mac OS:
before:  15m22.5s
after: 9m44.4s

Most of the buildkite steps also are a few minutes faster.

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

title: Speed up tests
